reviews.comment:
La atención no es buena, parece que te hicieran un favor... Se pierde mucho tiempo para cargar combustible porque atienden de a uno a la vez, aunque haya fila.

(Translated by Google)
The service isn't good, it feels like they're doing you a favor... You waste a lot of time filling up with gas because they serve you one at a time, even when there's a line.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZd1BQT2lRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todavía no sé porqué sigo siendo socio. Muchas veces dicen no tienen línea para pagar con debito.  AL menos en el ACA de Neuquén. Para nada creíble.  Nunca sucede en Shell o Axion. Raro no?

(Translated by Google)
I still don't know why I'm still a member. They often say they don't have a line for debit card payments. At least at the ACA in Neuquén. Completely unbelievable. It never happens at Shell or Axion. Strange, isn't it?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvaDdyeWRREAE

reviews.comment:
Como estación de servicio, sé que son los primeros en actualizar los precios de las naftas. Por otro lado tiene venta de comida por peso y es rica y variada, pero hay que ir 11:30 a 12:00 hs sino te quedan pocas opciones porque se llevan todo. La comida tiene buen precio, pero ojo con las ensaladas porque si son más costosas.

(Translated by Google)
As a gas station, I know they're the first to update their fuel prices. They also sell food by weight, and the selection is good and varied, but you have to go between 11:30 and 12:00, otherwise you'll be left with few options because they sell out quickly. The food is reasonably priced, but be careful with the salads because they tend to be more expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvNmZycXR3RRAB

Las 2 estrellas corresponden al sector kiosco y servicios de cafetería, mala atención, tienen solamente un par de galletitas, no tienen nunca sandwiches y el baño está sucio

(Translated by Google)
The 2 stars are for the kiosk and cafeteria services; poor service, they only have a couple of cookies, they never have sandwiches, and the bathroom is dirty.
